mapper.select: select post_id, user_id, menu_id, subcategory, title, content, view_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from posts where 1 = 1 order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into posts ( user_id, menu_id, subcategory, title, content, view_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{menuId}, #{subcategory}, #{title}, #{content}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, now(), now(), 'N' )
mapper.select: select post_id, user_id, menu_id, subcategory, title, content, view_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from posts where post_id = #{postId}
